name: Update Checker
description: Pac-Man themed system update checker for pacman-based distros.

check-interval.label: Check interval
check-interval.desc: How often the widget checks for updates.

initial-animation.label: Initial animation duration
initial-animation.desc: How long Pac-Man animates after updates are detected.

idle-chomp.label: Idle chomp interval
idle-chomp.desc: How often Pac-Man chomps when already up to date.

themed-idle-color.label: Use themed idle icon color
themed-idle-color.desc: When disabled, the up-to-date Pac-Man icon uses a fixed neutral color instead of the current theme color.

show-idle-pellet.label: Show idle pellet
show-idle-pellet.desc: Displays the small pellet in the up-to-date idle state.
